summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Aashwashan mental health website UI fixes. All requested features verified and working correctly.

teal_theme_consistency.details: All pages (Homepage, About, Resources, Team, Community, Blog, Contact, Join Our Team) have consistent teal/cyan gradient theme

navbar_cta_button.details: Navbar has teal gradient CTA button 'Book a Therapist' with classes from-teal-500 to-cyan-600

team_page_booking_modal_no_coupon.details: Team page booking modal has NO coupon code UI - correctly removed

homepage_booking_modal_no_coupon.details: Homepage booking modal has NO coupon code UI - correctly removed

tell_more_label.details: 'Do you want to tell more?' label present in both Homepage and Team page booking modals (replaced 'Additional Information')

footer_logo.details: Footer logo displays correctly using GIF image from customer-assets.emergentagent.com with transparent background (no white background)

contact_page_text.details: Contact page shows 'We're Here For You' instead of 'Working Hours'

session_pricing.details: Session pricing displayed correctly: 30 min ₹999, 45 min ₹1400, 60 min ₹1600

critical_code_review_comments: Homepage.jsx still contains unused coupon code variables and functions (lines 18-19, 49-51, 82-84, 96-115) that could be cleaned up for code hygiene, though they don't affect functionality since UI doesn't render them
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes verified: 1) Teal theme consistent across all 8 pages 2) No coupon code UI in booking modals 3) 'Do you want to tell more?' label in place 4) Footer logo displays correctly 5) Contact page shows 'We're Here For You' 6) Session pricing correct 7) Navbar has teal gradient CTA
